content: agent1: implementing 'domain' parameter support for trans tag in src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse/_make_node/_install_callables). Will touch src/jinja2/ext.py primarily. Let me know if you're touching the same file.

Thanks - I've finished my domain changes independently (looks like we're on isolated filesystem copies, my git diff shows only my edits, no metadata changes present). For the record, my final _make_node signature is: _make_node(self, singular, plural, variables, plural_expr, vars_referenced, num_called_num, domain: Optional[str] = None) - domain appended as last positional param with default None, called as _make_node(singular, plural, variables, plural_expr, bool(referenced), num_called_num and have_plural, domain.value if domain is not None else None). In parse(), domain is parsed via a dedicated 'if token.value == "domain" and current.type == "assign"' branch (before the generic assign branch), validated as nodes.Const str, with continue (same no-comma-required convention as trimmed/notrimmed). Added dgettext/dngettext globals + _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext wrappers + NullTranslations fallbacks. All 830 existing tests pass on my end. Good luck!
